entries.reason: No normal operator action is required. PR Release Notes are projected automatically. GitHub Actions summary is the owner-visible observability surface for docs deploy, GitHub Release, npm version, dist-tags, retry and repair. Recovery reruns the serialized workflow or manual recovery entry; rollback disables automation, reverts docs, and restores Cloudflare without mutating published npm versions.
entries.note: Advisory precedent only; matching this fingerprint never auto-closes future gates.

entries.reason: The PR has one owner-visible decision: project merged PR metadata deterministically to docs and, only for version increases, release the exact merge SHA. Workflow, parser, PR contract, manual, version, and tests are inseparable surfaces of that decision.
entries.note: Advisory precedent only; matching this fingerprint never auto-closes future gates.

entries.reason: Disable the post-merge workflow, revert generated documentation commits, and restore Cloudflare last-known-good. Published npm versions are immutable and are never deleted or overwritten; recovery converges tags only after matching gitHead. Version-unchanged behavior stops after docs deployment, and focused tests cover beta upgrade plus mismatch rejection.
entries.note: Advisory precedent only; matching this fingerprint never auto-closes future gates.
